positive: A majestic, stylized mountain landscape at sunset, featuring a silhouette of a whimsical, gentle forest-dwelling creature—perhaps a stylized fox or deer—standing contemplatively. The scene should use deep indigo, burnt orange, and vibrant violet gradients, evoking a sense of wonder and calm. The overall composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for a repeating or central apparel print. Use a minimalist, graphic art style with strong, clean line work and high contrast. The foreground should contain simple, stylized flora elements. Studio quality, vector illustration feel, cinematic lighting, perfect print quality.
negative: blur, grainy, noise, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, low contrast, oversaturated, dirty, messy, amateur, poor anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, cartoonish, photographic
